title: Pi claims inability then provides details anyway — contradictory capability signaling
what_failed: Pi told user it couldn't analyze docs/content, then proceeded to give details about it. Contradictory responses erode trust and signal broken capability routing logic.
suggested_fix: Before refusing a capability, verify it's actually unavailable in current mode. If tools are enabled, attempt before refusing. Add a pre-refusal check.
resolution: consciousness_normie.txt updated with: (1) explicit image handling — CAN analyze images via vision, MUST describe what is actually seen (no guessing from context/memory), failure message if vision fails. (2) document/file rules — cannot open in normie, but EXCEPTION if content already in ACTIVE CONTEXT from prior root session. (3) T-141 hard rule: NEVER refuse a question and then answer it anyway — pick one and commit. (4) explicit rule: if fact is in ACTIVE CONTEXT, use it directly — do not redirect to root.
